mapper.insert:
insert into order_detail (name, order_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount, image) values
(#{od.name}, #{od.orderId}, #{od.dishId}, #{od.setmealId}, #{od.dishFlavor}, #{od.number}, #{od.amount}, #{od.image})
mapper.select: select od.name, sum(od.number) as number from order_detail od inner join orders o on od.order_id = o.id where o.status = 5 and o.order_time >= #{begin} and o.order_time <= #{end} group by od.name order by number desc limit 10
